title: [推到完場] 2018/19 歐聯分組賽抽籤

replies.msg:
抽籤時間：31/8/2018 00:00
地點：Grimaldi Forum in Monaco
直播：UEFA.com

Pot one: Real Madrid, Atletico Madrid, Barcelona, Bayern Munich, Manchester City, Juventus, Paris St-Germain, Lokomotiv Moscow.

Pot two: Borussia Dortmund, Porto, Manchester United, Shakhtar Donetsk, Napoli, Tottenham Hotspur, Roma.

Pot three: Schalke, Lyon, Monaco, Ajax, CSKA Moscow.

Pot four: Club Brugge, Galatasaray, Young Boys, Inter Milan, Hoffenheim, AEK Athens.

To be decided: Liverpool, Valencia, Viktoria Plzen, plus three play-off winners.

Play-off first-leg results: Benfica 1-1 PAOK, BATE 2-3 PSV, Red Star Belgrade 0-0 Salzburg.

UEFA has announced the TV pairings for the #UCLdraw. It means these pairs cannot play on the same day as each other.

So, for instance, Man United will be drawn into Group A-D and Liverpool into Group E-H (or vice versa) so one plays on Tuesday and the other on Wednesday, etc.

replies.msg:
作為一個魚拉突 咁既分組真係得啖笑

講真咁同直接宣佈曼首名有咩分別。

令我地班魚拉突 totally no mood to 捱夜睇波 嗱,我又分析下 首先燕毫分,唔好玩啦 荷蘭野，6分穩陣

禾堡,,如果皇狗就有可觀性(順便可以報上次ga仇)(不過算啦,入到決賽又會見到面) 我真係冇睇過依隊野..曼半力夠WIN,又6分

最後一隊,我連名都唔記得 我地出青年軍練下is ok,又6分

加上我地4大尖刀 朗尼,爆炸頭,小豆,小豬 加上關鍵王梳爾.. 根本場場大炒,,,,

18分就一定..係睇下破唔破到得失球.咁一面倒ga比賽,我冇興趣,大家16強見

P.S.比d咁ga對手魚拉突..is侮辱..哈
